These character sprites are royalty free.

You may:
- Use these assets in personal and commercial projects
- Modify and edit the assets
- Use the assets in games, visual novels, videos, and other media
- Sell projects that include these assets

You may NOT:
- Resell the assets separately
- Redistribute the original files
- Redistribute modified versions of the assets as standalone assets

Credit is not required but appreciated.
